mitre_tactics.justification: Exploitation for Client Execution (Execution) — Exploitation of software vulnerability in client applications to achieve code execution. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Reflective Code Loading
mitre_tactics.justification: Reflective Code Loading (Defense Evasion) — Payloads loaded directly into memory without writing to disk, evading file-based detection. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Credentials from Password Stores
mitre_tactics.justification: Credentials from Password Stores (Credential Access) — Passwords extracted from browser credential stores, keychains, or password managers. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Application Layer Protocol
mitre_tactics.justification: Application Layer Protocol (Command and Control) — C2 traffic blended with legitimate application-layer protocols to evade inspection. Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Exfiltration Over Web Service
mitre_tactics.justification: Exfiltration Over Web Service (Exfiltration) — Data exfiltrated to legitimate cloud services (Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive). Technique ID mapped from threat intelligence corpus.

mitre_tactics.name: Phishing
